HCMC dbt Meetup #8

Hosted by Geri P. and 3 others

Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup
4.3
18 reviews
Details

🤩 HCMC dbt Meetup Vol. 8 is coming up on Saturday, 27 September. Join us to learn from experts and get to know your peers in the data & AI community.

This edition will bring two exciting talks:

🎙️ Improving DevX in dbt with CI/CD & Co-pilot
Nhat Nguyen, Senior Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda

In this session, Nhat will show you how to make CI/CD your new comfort zone with dbt’s robust support of code integration that helps verify and deploy code quickly and efficiently.

Nhat will also show us how LLMs can help lower entry barrier for new dbt practitioner and improve productivity for experienced developers.

🎙️ Streamlining Enterprise Incident Analysis with GenAI
Hung To, Head of Data at Datum Consulting
Tai Le, AI/Data Engineer at Datum Consulting

Hung and Tai will show us a custom GenAI solution designed to help analyse complex cloud incidents at enterprise level. In this session, we will see why it is crucial to get fast insights and how to cut the time to resolve critical issues.

Moderator: Terry Do, Operations Manager, Joon Solutions

————————

EVENT DETAILS

🗓️ When: Saturday, 27 September, 9 AM–12 PM

📍 Where: C-Space Coworking Office
62 Vo Van Tan, Ward 6, District 3, HCMC
Find on Google Maps

🎟️ Admission: free event, limited seats. RSVP to book a spot.
🧡 Organisers: Infinite Lambda and Joon Solutions
🍕 Refreshments will be provided

————————

🤩 HCMC dbt Meetup Vol. 7 is coming your way. On Saturday, 12 October, join HCMC’s data community to learn from experts and expand your network.

This edition's topic is:

>> DATA QUALITY <<

Format: Panel discussion

Panellists

Thu Huynh, Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda
Hoang Tran, Customer Success Engineer at Hydrolix
Dung To, Analytics Manager at Unilever
Nam Nguyen, Senior Analytics Engineer at Joon Solutions

Moderators

Marco Sollie, Co-Founder at Joon Solutions
Minh Ngo, Analytics tech Lead at Infinite Lambda

EVENT DETAILS

Date & time: Saturday, 12 October, 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Admission: free. Just RSVP Yes to this event to book a seat.
Venue
C-Space Coworking
62 Vo Van Tan, Ward 6, District 3, HCMC
Find on Google Maps

Seats are limited. RSVP Yes to this event to book your seat.

- - - - - - - -

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics, such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modelling, testing, and team structures.

- - - - - - - -

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/

🤝 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-vietnam channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Read more
Speaker
Thu Huynh, Hoang Tran, Dung To, Nam Nguyen

Thu Huynh, Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda
Thu has more than 7 years of experience in Business Intelligence, primarily focusing on the retail and e-commerce industries. She started her journey in the field as a data analyst and gradually developed an interest in applying engineering best practices to streamline and scale analytics work, which brought her straight to analytics. Thu is certified in Tableau, Looker, dbt and Snowflake, and continuously leverages the modern data stack to deliver value to organisations.

Hoang Tran, Customer Success Engineer at Hydrolix
Hoang Tran brings over 3 years of experience with cutting-edge data technology. He is an analytics engineering advocate, raising awareness of the power of the modern data stack to deliver highly-impactful solutions that make a difference for the business.

Nam Nguyen, Senior Analytics Engineer at Joon Solutions
Nam has over 4 years of experience in data modelling, architecture and analysis. He is keen to find the most efficient ways modern data technology can be leveraged to unlock business growth. Nam is Snowpro and GCP certified.

Dung To, Analytics Manager at Unilever
Dung has 6 years of experiences with the modern data stack, having been helping diverse clients in market research, fintech and e-commerce. He is well-versed in SQL, Python as well as various types of infrastructure. Currently, Dung is on a digital transformation mission with Unilever.

## 🤩 HCMC dbt MEETUP VOL. 6 is coming your way.

On Saturday, 6 July, join the data community to learn from experts and expand your network.

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data. Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics, such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modelling, testing, and team structures.

-- PRESENTATION --

dbt ON OPEN-SOURCE LAKEHOUSE ARCHITECTURE
🎤 Phuc Tran & Hai Nguyen, senior data engineers at ShopBack Vietnam

Data engineers Phuc Tran & Hai Nguyen are going to explore the use dbt for data transformations within an open-source lakehouse architecture. The presentation looks at real-world examples of leveraging dbt to tackle data cleaning and transformation, as well as build analytical models.
You are going to learn about the advantages and the potential challenges this approach comes with.

-- EVENT DETAILS --

🗓️ When: Saturday, 6 July, 8:30 am — 12 pm
🏠Where: Family Garden, 28 Thao Dien, Thu Duc City: https://maps.app.goo.gl/hL2c3vNWu8zVLQXm6
🤝 Organizers: Joon Solutions and Infinite Lambda
Admission: FREE
🍕 Snacks and drinks are on us

Sign up now to book your seat.

------------------

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

------------------

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Alex Welch, Head of Data @dbt Labs
Topic: BI Tools & Semantic Layer
When: June 27 @ 4pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!
This month we have Alex Welch, Head of Data at dbt Labs, to answer questions and discuss more about BI tools, analytics trends & the Semantic Layer!

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-merge channel in Slack to participate live!

Sat, Apr 13, 2024 · 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM ICT

Holistics Vietnam office

457 Nguyễn Đình Chiểu · Quận 3

HCMC dbt Meetup #5

Hosted by Chau Le .

Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup
4.3
18 reviews
Details

🤩 HCMC dbt MEETUP VOL. 5 is coming your way.
Join the data community, learn from experts and expand your network. See you there, okay?

🔥 ABOUT THIS EVENT
At this edition, we are going to learn how to leverage dbt to fix bugs and maintain data quality. We will also focus on driving efficiency for data analysts and empowering ownership of data models.

We are going to see demos an real-world examples of everything we talk about.

Note that presentations will be delivered in English.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://bit.ly/4azcreT

-- TOPICS & SPEAKERS --

1️⃣ Collecting and managing dbt test results: a pragmatic approach to handling dbt warnings
Speaker: Minh Ngo (Enlin), Analytics Tech Lead at Infinite Lambda

Minh Ngo has extensive experience in analytics, which invariably involves chasing bugs. He argues we need to treat dbt bugfix as a separate process from feature development.

In this talk, Minh is going to look at real project examples of dbt issues workflow. He is going to touch upon:

Recording dbt issues by parsing run metadata;
Issue classification & prioritisation (data quality);
Community packages that help us automate the process.

Minh is also going to give a live demo to show us how it all comes together.

2️⃣ Harnessing the simplicity of dbt and BigQuery to make your data talk for free
Speaker: Bruno Rassat, Data Lead at Entobel

For data analysts, reading and manipulating data effectively is crucial. In this talk, Bruno Rassat is going to delve into how dbt empowers this and enables analysts’ ownership of their underlying data models.

In this presentation, we are going to see a live demo of using dbt for transformations, testing and data literacy.

-- SCHEDULE --
09:00 – 09:10: Registration
09:15 – 09:20: Opening remarks
09:20 – 09:50 Talk #1 + Q&A
09:55 – 10:25: Talk #2 + Q&A
10:30 – 12:00: Networking

The event is suitable for:

Folks just starting out on their data journey;
People with some experience with the modern data stack;
Seasoned professionals who want to keep expanding their knowledge.

-- VENUE --
Holistics Vietnam office
https://maps.app.goo.gl/VPR4u3x3H5rSZ2io6

[Address in Vietnamese]
2nd Floor, 457 Nguyễn Đình Chiểu, Phường 5, Quận 3, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

[Address in English]
457 Nguyen Dinh Chieu, Level 2
District 3, Ward 5
Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

🚀 See you soon, data buddies.

----------------------------------

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/

dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organisation can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Minh Ngo (Data Tech Lead, Infinite Lambda) & Bruno Rassat (Data Lead, Entobel)

Minh Ngo is an analytics engineer with over 6 years of experience. Some of his favourite tools to work with include dbt, Snowflake, Fivetran, Airflow and Metabase. He loves automating bug-fixing processes and his worst nightmare is inconsistent SQL indentation.

Bruno Rassat is a data professional that has been transforming raw data into actionable insights for over 7 years now. Bruno helps companies start leveraging the modern data stack to embrace data-driven decision-making.

🤝 Organizers: community members Terry Nguyen, Violet Le, Marco Sollie

How to find us
HCM City dbt Meetup #2 (in-person)
D

Hosted by dbt L. and Giang Đỗ (.

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup
4.3
18 reviews
Details

🔥We are excited to bring HCM-based & nearby folks from the dbt Community together! Looking forward to the upcoming HCM-dbt-meet-up #2

Expect a happy hour, some bites, refreshments, and good vibes!!! 🥘🍕🥤
🏠Venue: Chotot Office - UOA Tower, Floor 18, 06 Tan Trao, Tan Phu Ward, District 7, HCMC
🤝Organizer: Joon Solutions
📝Agenda

9:00 - 9:30: Registration
9:30 - 9:45: Welcome remarks
9:45 - 10:15: Talk 1 (25 min + 5 min QA)
10:15 - 10:45: Talk 2 (25 min + 5 min QA)
10:45 - 11:00: Closing remarks
11:00 - 11:30: Group photo + Networking

🗣️Presentation #1 (Tentative): Building data driven organization: lesson learned

Description: Data is considered a new kind of resource in the 20th century and provides an additional competitive edge to those who can leverage it effectively. McKinsey Global Institute says that data-driven organizations are 23 times more likely to acquire customers, 6 times as likely to retain customers, and 19 times as likely to be profitable. Therefore a lot of organizations are investing their resources in data infrastructure, analytics, and people to achieve this milestone. In this talk, I will share the lesson learned, experience collected so far during the journey of building the data-driven organization at Chotot. The sharing aims for practical applications and is designed for data professionals, managers, senior leaders who want to embed data deeply in their organization

Data Evolution at Chotot
Factors of building data driven organization and lesson learned
Direct impact of Data on business

Speaker bio: Thien Pham, Senior Data Science Manager at Chotot
---

🗣️Presentation #2: Is your dbt project following good practices? A check using dbt evaluator package

Description:

Common Pain points building dbt project
Directory Structure
Data Accuracy (Missing tests)
Outdated documentation
Intro to dbt-project-evaluator package
Benefits
Demo
How Infinite Lambda project is applying this package

Speaker bio: Thu Huynh - Tech Lead I Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda

The doors open at 9 am. Presentations begin at 9:45 am.
Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to info@joonsolutions.com or DM in dbt Slack if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

***

Coalesce: The Analytics Engineering Conference
Network event

D

Ho Chi Minh City dbt Meetup
4.3
18 reviews
Details

In case you missed it, dbt Labs is hosting Coalesce 2022 from October 17 - 21. It is the annual conference dedicated to advancing the practice of analytics engineering. Coalesce offers data practitioners an opportunity to deepen their knowledge and network. You can choose your own adventure including in-person, online, and hybrid experiences.

Coalesce Online (FREE) | October 17-21, 2022. The online experience that you know and love. Connect with data practitioners around the globe in sessions designed for North America, APAC, EMEA and LATAM regions. Catch live stream sessions from Coalesce New Orleans, interact with the community and speakers via Slack, and attend exclusively virtual sessions.
Coalesce New Orleans | October 17-21, 2022 | Located at the Hyatt Regency, New Orleans. Our first time together, in person! Attend a presentation, workshop, or panel discussion. Participate in activities, a hackathon, intimate discussions, and social activities. Meet community members and partners while exploring the history and culture of New Orleans.
Coalesce Online + | London, 20 October 2022 | Sydney, 21 October 2022. A one-day event taking place in London and Sydney, complementing Coalesce Online. This will include tech talks, hosted discussions, an Executive keynote and a post-event networking session.

⚠️Please note that Coalesce 2022 won't be hosted on Meetup.com.
✅REGISTER + SIGN UP for sessions here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com
📅Review the schedule here: https://coalesce.getdbt.com/schedule
⭐As a member of the dbt Meetup Network, please use your discount code MEETUP15 for Premium and GA tickets.

Details

dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow. Events will focus on the impact of dbt in the data community and professional development tools for analytics engineers.

✨Details:
We are excited to help bring HCM-based folks and folks in the surrounding areas from the dbt Community together! Looking forward to socializing and meeting in the first HCM dbt Meetup.
Expect a happy hour, some bites, refreshments, and good vibes.

🏠Venue: Dreamplex Ngo Quang Huy, 42 Ngô Quang Huy, Thảo Điền, District 2, Hochiminh City
🤝Organizer: Joon Solutions

📝Agenda

18:00 - 18:30 Check in/Registration
18:30 - 18:35 Welcome and Introductions
18:35 - 18:45 Meet someone new
18:45 - 19:05 Presentation 1
19:05 - 19:10 Presentation 1 Q&A
19:10 - 19:20 Icebreaker/ Game
19:20 - 19:40 Presentation 2
19:40 - 19:45 Presentation 2 Q&A
19:45 - 19:50 Closing Remarks & call for subsequent speakers
19:50 - 20:30 Post session chat and networking

Event language: English.

🗣️Presentation #1: Analytics Engineer & dbt
Description: Getting started as an AE

Analytics engineering concepts and why data modeling is important for data people
Example data model creation showing a clear dbt use case
Early challenges in creating your data models and pitfalls to avoid
Give it a try - Become an AE in 90 days and join the dbt slack channel for feedback on your progress

Speaker bio: Hoang Elliot, Lead Analytic Engineer, Joon Solutions
---
🗣️Presentation #2: Making sense of the modern data landscape
Description:

The field of analytics and business intelligence have been around for about 60 years. It is incredibly confusing. There are many vendors, fads, trends, technologies and buzzwords in the market — and it’s been this way for most of those six decades. It is impossible to expect new data professionals to be familiar with all that has come before, or to identify new developments as trends that will repeat in the future.This talk aims to give you enough so that you know how to orient yourself in this landscape. It’ll cover the relevant history and shift of data/BI, and explain why different tools are built the way they are. The talk is designed for data professionals with some knowledge of the space, yet still don’t have the full picture of the entire landscape.

Speaker bio: Huy Nguyen, CTO and Co-founder at Holistics, Forbes 30 Under 30 Asia

The doors open at 6pm. Presentations begin at 6:30 pm.
Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to info@joonsolutions.com or DM in dbt Slack if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."
***
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
📣For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-vietnam channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/)

Please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb
----------------------------------
dbt is an open source command-line tool that speaks the preferred language of data analysts everywhere—SQL. With dbt, analysts take ownership of the entire analytics engineering workflow, from writing data transformation code to deployment and documentation.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/
